# Base Layer Skin

> Men's skincare engineered for active lifestyles. One product with six clinically-proven active ingredients. Formulated in Breckenridge, Colorado. Base Layer makes a single Daily Performance Face Cream designed to replace multiple steps in a skincare routine. Every ingredient is backed by clinical research, with no fragrance, parabens, or fillers.

## Product
- [Daily Performance Face Cream ($38)](https://baselayerskin.co/face-cream): A 50mL advanced men's face moisturizer combining six clinical-grade actives — niacinamide 5% for oil control and barrier repair, copper peptide GHK-Cu for collagen synthesis and anti-aging, panthenol (pro-vitamin B5) for deep hydration and wound healing, centella asiatica for calming inflammation and redness, squalane for lightweight non-comedogenic moisture, and hyaluronic acid for multi-layer hydration. Fragrance-free, suitable for all skin types including sensitive and acne-prone skin.

## Ingredients
- [Niacinamide](https://baselayerskin.co/niacinamide): Vitamin B3 at 5% concentration. Clinically proven to regulate sebum production, minimize pore appearance, strengthen the skin barrier, and even skin tone. One of the most well-studied actives in dermatology with over 50 peer-reviewed studies supporting its efficacy.
- [Copper Peptide](https://baselayerskin.co/copper-peptide): GHK-Cu tripeptide complex. Stimulates collagen and elastin production, accelerates wound healing, and provides antioxidant protection. Research shows it can remodel damaged skin and reduce fine lines more effectively than retinol in some studies, without the irritation.
- [Hyaluronic Acid](https://baselayerskin.co/hyaluronic-acid): A naturally occurring humectant that holds up to 1000x its weight in water. Provides multi-depth hydration by drawing moisture into the skin and preventing transepidermal water loss. Essential for maintaining plump, hydrated skin in dry or cold climates.
- [Squalane](https://baselayerskin.co/squalane): A stable, plant-derived emollient that mimics the skin's natural sebum. Provides lightweight, non-greasy moisture without clogging pores. Excellent for men who want hydration without a heavy or shiny feel. Also acts as an antioxidant to protect against environmental damage.
- [Panthenol](https://baselayerskin.co/panthenol): Pro-vitamin B5 that converts to pantothenic acid in the skin. Deeply hydrating, anti-inflammatory, and promotes skin regeneration. Clinically shown to improve skin barrier function and accelerate recovery from irritation, making it ideal for post-shave care.
- [Centella Asiatica](https://baselayerskin.co/centella-asiatica): A botanical extract also known as Cica or tiger grass, used for centuries in traditional medicine. Contains madecassoside, asiaticoside, and other triterpenoids that calm inflammation, promote collagen synthesis, and accelerate healing. Particularly effective for sensitive or redness-prone skin.

## Skin Concerns
- [Oily Skin](https://baselayerskin.co/oily-skin-men): How niacinamide and squalane work together to regulate sebum production without stripping moisture. Guides for men dealing with excess oil, shine, and enlarged pores, including how a proper moisturizer actually reduces oiliness.
- [Dry Skin](https://baselayerskin.co/dry-dehydrated-skin-men): Understanding the difference between dry and dehydrated skin in men. How hyaluronic acid, panthenol, and squalane provide multi-layer hydration and barrier repair for men exposed to cold, wind, or dry indoor air.
- [Sensitive Skin](https://baselayerskin.co/sensitive-skin-men): Why men's skin becomes sensitized and how centella asiatica, panthenol, and a fragrance-free formula help calm and protect reactive skin. Guidance on building a routine that minimizes irritation triggers.
- [Aging & Wrinkles](https://baselayerskin.co/aging-wrinkles-men): How copper peptide GHK-Cu and niacinamide combat signs of aging by stimulating collagen production, improving skin elasticity, and reducing fine lines. Why men should start anti-aging skincare earlier than they think.
- [Acne-Prone Skin](https://baselayerskin.co/acne-prone-skin-men): Non-comedogenic approach to managing acne-prone skin with niacinamide for oil control and centella asiatica for inflammation reduction. Why heavy moisturizers worsen breakouts and how lightweight clinical formulas help.
- [Post-Shave Irritation](https://baselayerskin.co/post-shave-irritation): How panthenol and centella asiatica soothe razor burn, ingrown hairs, and post-shave redness. Why a proper moisturizer is the most important post-shave step, replacing alcohol-based aftershaves that damage the skin barrier.
- [Dark Circles](https://baselayerskin.co/dark-circles-men): Understanding the causes of dark under-eye circles in men — from poor sleep to thin periorbital skin. How copper peptide strengthens the delicate under-eye area and niacinamide improves circulation and pigmentation.

## Articles
- [Best Moisturizer for Men](https://baselayerskin.co/best-moisturizer-for-men): An evidence-based guide to choosing a men's face moisturizer. Covers what ingredients to look for, what to avoid, and why most "men's skincare" products are overpriced and underformulated. Explains the science behind effective hydration.
- [Why Men's Skin Is Different](https://baselayerskin.co/why-mens-skin-is-different): The biological differences between men's and women's skin — including 25% thicker dermis, higher collagen density, more active sebaceous glands, and the effects of testosterone on skin structure. Why men need formulations designed for their specific skin biology.
- [3-Step Skincare Routine](https://baselayerskin.co/3-step-skincare-routine): A simplified, no-nonsense skincare routine for men: cleanse, treat, protect. Explains why most men don't need 10 products and how a single well-formulated moisturizer can replace serums, eye creams, and treatments.
- [Common Skincare Mistakes](https://baselayerskin.co/skincare-mistakes): The most common mistakes men make with their skin — from using bar soap on the face to skipping moisturizer because of oily skin. Evidence-based corrections for each mistake with practical advice.

## About
- [About Base Layer](https://baselayerskin.co/about): Base Layer was founded in Breckenridge, Colorado by men who wanted effective skincare without the complexity. The brand focuses on one product done right rather than an expanding product line. Every ingredient is selected based on clinical evidence, and the formula is continuously refined based on dermatological research.
- Instagram: @baselayerskin
